summary: Crew Chat & Payment Window Expiry Scheduler Testing Complete. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. All Crew Chat API endpoints working (GET /info, GET /messages, POST /send, POST /mark-read). Scheduler confirmed running with payment_expiry jobs registered. Frontend: Crew Chat page loads correctly with message history, online participants, and real-time messaging via WebSocket.
critical_code_review_comments: scheduler.py: check_payment_window_expiry_task registered and running every 5 minutes (confirmed in logs)
scheduler.py: send_payment_expiry_reminders_task registered and running every 5 minutes
crew_chat.py: GET /api/crew-chat/{booking_id}/info returns participants, online_users, my_role, unread_count
crew_chat.py: GET /api/crew-chat/{booking_id}/messages returns paginated message history with has_more flag
crew_chat.py: POST /api/crew-chat/{booking_id}/send creates message and broadcasts via WebSocket
crew_chat.py: WebSocket endpoint /api/ws/crew-chat/{booking_id}/{user_id} handles real-time messaging
CrewChat.js: Component renders with data-testid='crew-chat-page', shows messages, participants, input field

success_rate.frontend: 100% - Crew Chat page renders and functions correctly

seed_data_creation: No new seed data created - used existing test booking
context_for_next_testing_agent: Crew Chat feature fully tested. Key endpoints: GET /api/crew-chat/{id}/info, GET /api/crew-chat/{id}/messages, POST /api/crew-chat/{id}/send. WebSocket at /api/ws/crew-chat/{booking_id}/{user_id}. Frontend route /bookings/{id}/chat renders CrewChat component. CrewHub has Chat button that navigates to crew chat. Payment Window Expiry Scheduler running every 5 minutes checking for expired payment windows.

scheduler_payment_expiry.details: check_payment_window_expiry_task registered and running every 5 minutes. Logs show: '[Scheduler] Checking payment window expiry...' and '[Scheduler] Found 0 expired payment windows'

scheduler_payment_reminders.details: send_payment_expiry_reminders_task registered and running. Logs show: '[Scheduler] Checking for payment expiry reminders...'

GET_crew_chat_info.details: Returns booking_id, participants, online_users, my_role, unread_count, booking_status, location, session_date

GET_crew_chat_messages.details: Returns paginated messages with sender info, timestamps, message_type, has_more flag

POST_crew_chat_send.details: Creates message, broadcasts via WebSocket, returns success and message_id

POST_crew_chat_mark_read.details: Marks messages as read, returns marked_count

websocket_crew_chat.details: WebSocket connects at /api/ws/crew-chat/{booking_id}/{user_id}, handles new_message, user_joined, user_left, typing events

frontend_crew_chat_page.details: CrewChat.js renders with header (Crew Chat, location, online count), participant avatars, message history, input field, send button

frontend_crew_chat_send_message.details: Message 'Test message from Playwright' sent successfully and displayed in chat

crew_hub_chat_button.details: CrewHub.js has Chat button (data-testid='crew-hub-chat-btn') that navigates to /bookings/{id}/chat

mocked_apis.note: OneSignal push notifications are MOCKED/skipped when API key not configured. All other endpoints use real database operations.

scheduler_logs_evidence: INFO:scheduler:[Scheduler] Jobs: surf_alerts (15min), story_cleanup (1hr), leaderboard_reset (monthly), grom_report (weekly), payment_expiry (5min)
INFO:scheduler:[Scheduler] Checking for payment expiry reminders...
